summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TUDOaqui Partner System. Backend: 18/18 tests passed - all partner endpoints working correctly including registration, profile, payment config, admin management, and checkout payment info. Frontend: Partner section visible on Account page for partner-eligible roles, registration form working, Admin Parceiros tab functional with stats and approve/suspend actions.
critical_code_review_comments: Partner system properly implements role-based access (vendedor, anfitriao, organizador, agente, motorista, entregador can register)
Payment config validation working - Unitel Money requires numero, Transferencia requires IBAN
Admin partner management has proper status flow: pendente -> aprovado/rejeitado, aprovado -> suspenso
CheckoutModal correctly fetches partner payment info when partner_id is provided
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

test_credentials.otp_retrieval: su - postgres -c "psql -d tudoaqui -t -A -c \"SELECT codigo FROM otp_codes WHERE telefone='<PHONE>' AND verificado=false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;\""

backend_endpoints.POST /api/v1/partners/register: Register as partner (requires partner role) - WORKING
backend_endpoints.GET /api/v1/partners/me: Get my partner profile with payment config - WORKING
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/v1/partners/me/payment: Configure payment data (Unitel Money, bank transfer) - WORKING
backend_endpoints.GET /api/v1/partners/{id}/payment-info: Get partner payment info for checkout (approved only) - WORKING

frontend_features.account_partner_section: Shows 'Parceiro TUDOaqui' section for partner-eligible roles - WORKING
frontend_features.partner_register_form: Modal with nome_negocio, descricao, provincia, cidade fields - WORKING
frontend_features.partner_payment_config_form: Form with Unitel Money, Transferencia, Dinheiro options - WORKING
frontend_features.admin_partners_tab: Shows stats (total, pendentes, aprovados, suspensos), partner cards with payment methods, approve/suspend/reject actions - WORKING
frontend_features.checkout_modal_partner_support: CheckoutModal fetches partner payment info when partner_id provided - VERIFIED IN CODE
